_comment: Framework attribution: the canonical method/author each skill encodes. Surfaced as a 'Based on' line on skill pages, the playground, and the catalog. Only skills with a genuine, well-known source are listed; the rest are intentionally omitted rather than given a fabricated citation.

sources.writing-great-skills: Anthropic Agent Skills authoring guidance + progressive disclosure
sources.cap-table-explainer: Y Combinator SAFE & standard round mechanics
sources.runway-planner: Default Alive or Dead — Paul Graham (Y Combinator)
sources.iep-goal-support: SMART IEP goals under IDEA (practitioner standard)
sources.metric-tree-builder: North-star metric / input-metric driver trees (Reforge, Amplitude)
sources.ab-test-readout: Frequentist A/B test inference (statistical & practical significance)
sources.feature-prioritisation: RICE, ICE, MoSCoW & Kano prioritisation models
sources.okr-builder: OKRs — John Doerr, *Measure What Matters* (Andy Grove)
sources.discovery-interview-guide: Continuous Discovery — Teresa Torres, *Continuous Discovery Habits*
sources.assumption-mapper: Assumption testing — *Testing Business Ideas* (David Bland); Teresa Torres
sources.job-story-mapper: Jobs To Be Done — Clayton Christensen; job stories (Alan Klement)
sources.ambiguity-resolver: Problem framing — the Double Diamond (Design Council)
sources.experiment-designer: Pretotyping — Alberto Savoia, *The Right It*; Lean Startup (Eric Ries)
sources.ab-test-planner: Controlled experiments — Kohavi, Tang & Xu, *Trustworthy Online Controlled Experiments*
sources.metrics-framework: North Star Framework (Amplitude); Pirate Metrics / AARRR (Dave McClure)
sources.user-story-writer: User stories & INVEST — Mike Cohn, *User Stories Applied*
sources.security-threat-model: STRIDE threat modeling — Microsoft / Adam Shostack
sources.code-review-checklist: Google Engineering Practices — Code Review Developer Guide
sources.investor-pitch-deck: Sequoia pitch deck template; Guy Kawasaki's 10/20/30 rule
sources.ux-research-plan: Nielsen Norman Group UX research methods
sources.ai-ethics-review: NIST AI Risk Management Framework; Google PAIR
sources.churn-analysis: Net revenue retention & churn cohort analysis
sources.red-team-review: Pre-mortem technique — Gary Klein; red-teaming practice
